ExtensionType.Label: Start and wait for A2A agent
ExtensionType.XmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ServiceTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="A2A.AgentExecution" version="v1" />
      <uipath:input name="body" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="a2aResponse" type="A2A.AgentExecution" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ServiceTask>
ExtensionType.InputFieldNotes: Auto-initialized by A2AFPSFormControl on load. Version is set to v2. Outputs include a2aResponse (jsonSchema with A2A response schema, source=result) and Error (any, source=Error).
ExtensionType.OutputNotes: Output schema includes: isSuccess (boolean), response (string), sessionId (string), status (string), taskId (string), artifacts (array of {index, parts, metadata}). Also includes Error output (type=any, source=Error).

InputFields.Name: agentUrl
InputFields.Description: URL of the A2A agent endpoint

InputFields.Name: skillId
InputFields.Description: Identifier for the specific skill to invoke on the agent

InputFields.Name: input
InputFields.Description: Input text/message to send to the A2A agent

InputFields.Name: authToken
InputFields.Description: Authentication token for the A2A agent

InputFields.Name: agentName
InputFields.Description: Display name of the A2A agent
